creator: draco@marino.st
text:
gnome-main-menu doesn't build anymore after the glib2 update.

Fix: 

Add the following 3 patches to the port to fix:

https://raw.github.com/jrmarino/DeltaPorts/master/ports/deskutils/gnome-main-menu/dragonfly/patch-libslab_application-tile.c
https://raw.github.com/jrmarino/DeltaPorts/master/ports/deskutils/gnome-main-menu/dragonfly/patch-libslab_system-tile.c
https://raw.github.com/jrmarino/DeltaPorts/master/ports/deskutils/gnome-main-menu/dragonfly/patch-main-menu_src_tomboykeybinder.h
